name: basic_subarray_containment
description: Session B [1,2,3] is a subarray of Session A [1,2,3,4,5], B should be removed

name: tail_subarray
description: Session B [3,4,5] is a tail subarray of Session A [1,2,3,4,5], B should be removed

name: middle_subarray
description: Session B [2,3,4] is a middle subarray of Session A [1,2,3,4,5], B should be removed

name: no_containment
description: No session is a subarray of another, nothing should be removed

name: identical_sessions_keep_earlier
description: Two sessions with identical MessageIDs, the one with larger ID should be removed

name: chain_containment
description: Session C is subarray of B, B is subarray of A; both B and C should be removed

name: single_element_subarray
description: Single element session [3] is a subarray of [1,2,3,4,5]

name: non_contiguous_not_subarray
description: Session B [1,3,5] shares elements but is NOT a contiguous subarray of A [1,2,3,4,5]

name: multiple_subarrays_of_same_parent
description: Multiple short sessions are subarrays of one long session

name: empty_message_ids_ignored
description: Sessions with empty MessageIDs are ignored and not marked as redundant

name: single_session
description: Only one session, nothing to deduplicate

name: three_identical_sessions
description: Three sessions with identical MessageIDs, keep the one with smallest ID
